mnemonics.title: DARK Silicon Memory Aid
mnemonics.content: DARK = Dark Area Requires Keeping - Remember that dark silicon occurs because area must be kept powered off to prevent overheating. Think of it as 'keeping the lights off in some rooms to prevent the house from overheating'.

mnemonics.title: PUE Remember It
mnemonics.content: PUE = Power Used Effectively? - Lower is better! Formula: Total Facility Energy ÷ IT Equipment Energy. Perfect PUE = 1.0 (all energy goes to computing).

mnemonics.title: Green IT Benefits of Consolidation
mnemonics.content: VRENCH - Virtualization Reduces Energy Consumption Heat. V-R-E-N-C-H: Virtualization, Reduces, Energy, Cooling, Heat, Numbers (fewer servers).

acronyms.usage: Dedicated processor for rendering graphics and parallel computations
Google's specialized AI accelerator for machine learning
Specialized processor for AI/neural network operations
Metric measuring data center energy efficiency (lower is better)
Processor specialized for digital signal processing tasks

acronyms.expansion: Silicon area that must remain unpowered
acronyms.usage: Describes chip regions that must be powered off due to thermal/power constraints

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a city where only half the buildings can have their lights on at once because the power grid can't handle more—the unlit buildings represent dark silicon.
Picture a 10-lane highway where only 1 lane has cars while 9 are empty—that empty space represents wasted resource utilization.
Think of moving from many small separate houses (individual servers) to one apartment building (virtualized server)—more efficient use of space and resources.
Imagine many phone chargers left plugged in overnight—they consume power even when not charging anything, similar to idle specialized chips.

analogies.analogy: Like having a separate kitchen appliance for every single food item (one for toast, one for eggs, one for coffee, one for noodles) instead of a versatile stove—each appliance takes space and energy even when unused.
Like a dedicated film camera processor becoming useless when everyone switched to digital phones—the specialized tool can't be repurposed for new needs.
Like a single bus carrying 50 passengers versus 50 individual cars each with one person—same work done with much less total resources.

analogies.anal analogy: PUE is like measuring how much of a restaurant's electricity goes to cooking (good) versus lighting, heating, and air conditioning (wasted from a cooking efficiency standpoint).
